description: Integrator Agent hooks - branch protection, quality gates, issue closure enforcement. Hook data is passed via stdin as JSON; scripts read from stdin, not env vars. Scripts honor Claude Code 2.1.132+ env vars ($CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID for log correlation, $CLAUDE_EFFORT for effort tier) and the 2.1.143 Stop-hook consecutive-block cap ($CLAUDE_CODE_STOP_HOOK_BLOCK_CAP, default 8).

PreToolUse._description: Blocks direct push to main/master branches. Diagnostic prints go to stderr (captured by Claude Code since 2.1.139 — hooks no longer have terminal access).
Blocks premature issue closure - requires merged PR, checkboxes, evidence, TDD. All progress prints route to stderr to keep stdout reserved for future JSON response payloads.

Stop._description: Blocks exit until all integration work is complete. Tracks consecutive blocks per session_id; at 5 blocks (62.5% of the 8 default cap enforced by Claude Code 2.1.143+) the response includes a friendly heads-up about the imminent auto-release.
